recommendations.title: Devotion
recommendations.overview: The harrowing true story of two elite US Navy fighter pilots during the Korean War. Their heroic sacrifices would ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

recommendations.title: The Red Turtle
recommendations.overview: The dialogue-less film follows the major life stages of a castaway on a deserted tropical island populated by turtles, crabs and birds.

recommendations.title: Retreat
recommendations.overview: Kate and Martin escape from personal tragedy to an Island Retreat. Cut off from the outside world, their attempts to recover are shattered when a man is washed ashore, with news of airborne killer disease that is sweeping through Europe.

recommendations.title: Vendetta

recommendations.title: The Jester
recommendations.overview: A malevolent being known as The Jester terrorizes the inhabitants of a small town on Halloween night, including two estranged sisters who must come together to find a way to defeat this evil entity.

recommendations.title: Lord of the Flies
recommendations.overview: When their plane crashes, 25 schoolboys find themselves trapped on a tropical island, miles from civilization.

recommendations.title: The Untold Story
recommendations.overview: Macau cops begin to suspect a man running a pork buns restaurant of murder, after tracing the origin of a case full of chopped up human remains that washed ashore, which leads them to him.
